items.title: Toronto Raptors guard Chucky Hepburn will sign his two-way qualifying offer and return to the team next season, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. He averaged 12.4 points and shot 36.8% from 3-point range with 8.6 assists and 2.4 steals for game with the Raptors
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Toronto Raptors guard Chucky Hepburn will sign his two-way qualifying offer and return to the team next season, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. He averaged 12.4 points and shot 36.8% from 3-point range with 8.6 assists and 2.4 steals for game with the Raptors 905 in the G League.
